subject: A robed witch standing on an elevated platform or balcony, arms raised, casting a hex over a crowd of villagers gathered below in a dim hall
description: A long-haired witch in dark flowing robes stands with arms outstretched on a raised stone platform, channeling a curse downward. Below her, a packed crowd of pale villagers stares up, their faces upturned and stricken. The chamber is gloomy, lit by cold blue and violet glints that catch on the witch's silhouette and the gathered figures. Architecture suggests a great hall or castle interior with a raised dais. The composition reads as a ritual of mass affliction — the witch elevated, the populace helpless beneath her.
foreground: crowd of upturned villager faces in muted tones
background: dim great hall with raised dais and witch silhouette under cold magical light
emotion: the witch is commanding and triumphant; the crowd is fearful, transfixed, helpless
